ogTitle: Padstow vs Pagans Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Padstow and Pagans Flat.
heading: Padstow vs Pagans Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Padstow, New South Wales and Pagans Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pagans Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Padstow (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Padstow or Pagans Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Padstow has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Pagans Flat scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Padstow scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Pagans Flat scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Padstow or Pagans Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pagans Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
